portrait.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG NPC portrait, bust shot of Seraphine — forest sage and guide. elf-like pointed ears, long green hair to back, emerald eyes, serene expression. Wearing robe woven from leaves and vines, moss decorations, bare feet. Holding/carrying living wooden staff with sprouting leaves, bioluminescent spore pouch. Special details: tree-pattern tattoos on skin, fireflies hovering around. Expression: mystical and contemplative. Set in Silvanhime region with ancient forest, spores, old growth atmosphere. 256x256 pixel art style, dark gradient background, game dialogue portrait. Art style: pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
